chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ زَادَ عَلَى خَمْسِ تَكْبِيرَاتٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The one who exceeds upon the five Takbeers

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/65)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/65)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: صَلَّى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَلَى حَمْزَةَ سَبْعِينَ صَلَاةً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Musanna Bin Al Waleed, from Zurara,
from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww prayed seventy Salaat upon Hamzaas’. (i.e. exclaimed seventy Takbeers – see Hadeeth 3 below).
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from al-Muthanna’ ibn al-Walid from Zurarah from who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah said seventy Salah (prayers) for Hamzah.’”
